[PUBLISHED DATE]: 2015-07-02
[TITLE]: 19 Unintentionally Inappropriate Sidewalk Chalk Drawings by Little Kids (PHOTOS)
[METADATA/INTRO]: Sidewalk chalk drawings done by kids are a treasure trove of weirdness. Sure, there are an impressively large number of rockets and trees that look like penises (why does every kid draw them that way?) but there are also a...
[BEST EVIDENCE CHUNK]: Do you have any pictures of sidewalk chalk drawings by your kids that look like something a little different? Can you top #8? 
 And We Have Our First Penis 
 The child who drew this said it was a race car; a very tall race car with no doors or steering wheel. The thing is a death trap. Also, totally looks like a penis. 
 One Hand With One Purpose 
 So your little person has no feet, ears, or nose, but does have one hand to flip people off with? This guy can ride shotgun with us any time. 
 Mom's Job Is Weird

[PUBLISHED DATE]: July 25, 2025
[TITLE]: VIRAL: Photo of orphan lying in mother's chalk outline | PEP.ph
[METADATA/INTRO]: Nakakaantig ng damdamin ang larawang ibinahagi ng Facebook page na Today i Learned, na nagtatampok ng interesting stories mula sa iba’t ibang bahagi ng mundo. Noong July 25, 2025, nag-post ito ng photo ng isang bata na nakahiga sa sementadong...
[BEST EVIDENCE CHUNK]: Dagdag pa ni Bahareh at paglilinaw: “I used a chair to stand on in order to take this shot. 
 “There is no orphanage involved and no tragic story behind this. I took this opportunity to be creative.” 
 Ibinahagi rin ni Bahareh na big fan siya ng ganitong style of photography. 
 Kabilang ito sa kanyang album kung saan tampok ang bird's eye view ng batang babae na nasa loob ng iba’t ibang chalk drawings. 
 Ang nag-viral na version ay ini-upload sa Instagram ng user na may handle na @arte_metaverse last February 24, 2025. 
 At bagama’t 2012 pa nakunan ni Bahareh ang original photo at iba’t iba ang naging kalakip na kuwento sa social media, pinatunayan ng imahe ang isang malakas na mensahe—na sa kabila ng kaguluhan sa mundo, nananatiling may malasakit sa puso ng mga tao.
